# Brijeshkumar Yadav

> Frontend Engineer.

I'm Brijeshkumar Yadav, a self-taught frontend engineer based in India with 5 years of experience. I specialize in building modern web applications using Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

My journey began during COVID, when I started learning on my own. With consistent practice, hard work, and real projects, I landed my first developer role in 2021, even before completing 12th grade.

Available for freelance projects and new opportunities. Say hello by [email](mailto:brijeshkumaryadav2026@gmail.com), or connect on [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/brijeshmarch16), or [X](https://x.com/brijeshmarch).

This file follows the [llms.txt specification](https://llmstxt.org), a proposed standard that helps AI language models and agents understand a website's content and structure.

## Skills & Expertise

**Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript
**Frameworks:** Next.js, React.js
**Styling:** Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
**Frontend Tools:** TanStack Query
**Runtime & Tools:** Node.js, Git, Docker
**AI Tools:** ChatGPT, Claude

## Projects

- [AI Interview](https://ai-interview.brijeshkumaryadav.com): Open source platform for companies to conduct AI powered hiring interviews with their candidates. Source: [GitHub](https://github.com/brijeshmarch16/ai-interview).
- [ReactUseKit](https://reactusekit.vercel.app): React hooks and helpers collection to copy, paste, or install with the shadcn CLI. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, fumadocs, and shadcn CLI. Source: [GitHub](https://github.com/brijeshmarch16/reactusekit).

## Blog

- [Building a Self-Hosted AI Voice Interview Platform Inspired by FoloUp](https://brijeshkumaryadav.com/blog/foloup-alternative-self-hosted-ai-interview-platform): An open-source, self-hosted FoloUp alternative for AI voice interviews, built with Better Auth and PostgreSQL, with source code available on GitHub.

## Experience

- Frontend Engineer at Freelance: May 2023 - Present.
- Full Stack Engineer at SolGuruz: Mar 2022 - Apr 2023.
- Frontend Engineer at Emperor Brains: May 2021 - Feb 2022.
